pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which explicitly inserts records with these IDs and salaries outside the Oracle standard HR schema job limits.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which explicitly inserts records with these IDs and future hire dates (2027-2029).
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which explicitly inserts records with these IDs having NULL department_id but valid manager_id.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh, verifying 5 salary violations, 4 future dates, and 3 null department issues inserted (total 12).

privileged_info_summary: The Oracle HR database is intentionally provisioned with 12 synthetic data quality issues across three categories. IDs 300, 301, 302, 303, and 304 have salaries that violate the minimum/maximum bounds for their respective job roles. IDs 305, 306, 307, and 308 have hire dates located in the future (between 2027 and 2029). IDs 309, 310, and 311 have NULL department IDs despite being assigned a manager.
